VEGAN.definition: A person who does not eat, drink or otherwise consume any animal products

meanings.definition: A person who does not eat, drink or otherwise consume any animal products
(of a product or practice, especially food) Not containing animal products (meat, eggs, milk, leather, etc) or inherently involving animal use.
meanings.example: He eats a completely vegan diet.

VENUE.definition: A theater, auditorium, arena, or other area designated for sporting or entertainment events.

meanings.definition: A theater, auditorium, arena, or other area designated for sporting or entertainment events.
A single act of visiting.
To habitually go to (someone in distress, sickness etc.) to comfort them. (Now generally merged into later senses, below.)

VOCAL.definition: A vocal sound; specifically, a purely vocal element of speech, unmodified except by resonance; a vowel or a diphthong; a tonic element; a tonic; distinguished from a subvocal, and a nonvocal

meanings.definition: A vocal sound; specifically, a purely vocal element of speech, unmodified except by resonance; a vowel or a diphthong; a tonic element; a tonic; distinguished from a subvocal, and a nonvocal
Of or pertaining to the voice or speech
meanings.example: vocal problems

VOGUE.example: Miniskirts were the vogue in the '60s.

meanings.definition: The prevailing fashion or style.
meanings.example: Miniskirts were the vogue in the '60s.

meanings.definition: To dance in the vogue dance style.

VOWEL.definition: A sound produced by the vocal cords with relatively little restriction of the oral cavity, forming the prominent sound of a syllable.

meanings.definition: A sound produced by the vocal cords with relatively little restriction of the oral cavity, forming the prominent sound of a syllable.
To add vowel points to a consonantal script (e.g. niqqud in Hebrew or harakat in Arabic)

WAIST.definition: The part of the body between the pelvis and the stomach.

meanings.definition: The part of the body between the pelvis and the stomach.

WAVER.definition: An act of wavering, vacillating, etc.

meanings.definition: An act of wavering, vacillating, etc.
To sway back and forth; to totter or reel.
meanings.example: Flowers wavered in the breeze.

meanings.definition: Grown.

WEAVE.definition: A type or way of weaving.
WEAVE.example: That rug has a very tight weave.

meanings.definition: A type or way of weaving.
meanings.example: That rug has a very tight weave.

meanings.definition: To form something by passing lengths or strands of material over and under one another.
meanings.example: This loom weaves yarn into sweaters.

WEIGH.definition: To determine the weight of an object.

meanings.definition: To determine the weight of an object.

WHITE.definition: The color/colour of snow or milk; the colour of light containing equal amounts of all visible wavelengths.

meanings.definition: The color/colour of snow or milk; the colour of light containing equal amounts of all visible wavelengths.
To make white; to whiten; to bleach.
The state of being wide.

WIELD.definition: To command, rule over; to possess or own.

meanings.definition: To command, rule over; to possess or own.

WISER.definition: Showing good judgement or the benefit of experience.
WISER.example: "It is a profitable thing, if one is wise, to seem foolish" - Aeschylus

meanings.definition: Showing good judgement or the benefit of experience.
meanings.example: "It is a profitable thing, if one is wise, to seem foolish" - Aeschylus

meanings.definition: An adult female human.

WOUND.definition: An injury, such as a cut, stab, or tear, to a (usually external) part of the body.

meanings.definition: An injury, such as a cut, stab, or tear, to a (usually external) part of the body.
To hurt or injure (someone) by cutting, piercing, or tearing the skin.
meanings.example: The police officer wounded the suspect during the fight that ensued.

WRECK.definition: Something or someone that has been ruined.
WRECK.example: He was an emotional wreck after the death of his wife.

meanings.definition: Something or someone that has been ruined.
meanings.example: He was an emotional wreck after the death of his wife.

meanings.definition: To destroy violently; to cause severe damage to something, to a point where it no longer works, or is useless.
meanings.example: He wrecked the car in a collision.
